items.title: LIVE: Columbia University faculty, Jewish leaders condemn ICE detention of Mahmoud Khalil
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Columbia University and Barnard College faculty, Jewish community leaders, and immigrant rights advocates hold a news conference to condemn the ICE detention of graduate student Mahmoud Khalil.

items.title: Tanker collision ignites fire off UK coast
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A tanker carrying jet fuel for the U.S. military was hit by a container ship off northeast England, with the collision igniting a fire on both vessels, causing multiple explosions and forcing both crews to abandon ship.
 
#Ship #Tanker #TankerCrash #NorthSea #UKCoast #Reuters

items.title: Sectors Up Close: Industrial production will return to US | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Trump wants industrial firms to return production to the US, but what does that mean for them? John Stoltzfus of Oppenheimer Asset Management says the tariffs will encourage domestic investment and it's a good time for investors to get on board.

items.content:

items.title: EU trade chief says US not seeking deal to avert tariffs | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>European Trade Commissioner Maros Sefcovic said that the US is not seeking a deal to avert tariffs. The comments come two days before Washington is set to impose tariffs on all steel and aluminum imports.

items.title: LIVE: Los Angeles DA gives update on the Menendez brothers case
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan J. Hochman provides an update on the Menendez brothers' case. Lyle and Erik Menendez were convicted in 1996 of first-degree murder and sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole for the shotgun murder of their parents. The case captivated the U.S. in the 1990s because of the brothers' wealth and privilege as sons of a record company and entertainment industry executive. 
 
#menendezbrothers #erikmenendez #lylemenendez #losangeles #us #legal #live #Reuters #News 
 
Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Philippe Lazzarini, Commissioner-General for the United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees in the Near East, briefs the media on the work of the agency across its areas of operation in Lebanon, Jordan, Syria, the occupied West Bank including East Jerusalem and the Gaza strip.

items.title: How a coat of paint is tackling extreme heat in an Indian slum | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Hundreds of roofs in the informal settlements of India's western Gujarat state have been painted in a reflective, white coating over the last two months to try to keep their occupants cooler as the hottest time of year approaches. 

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #world #climate #environment #India #summer #heatwave #Gujarat #paint

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Market Talk: 'Rheinmetall is the new Nvidia' | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>As the prospect of increased defense spending by European governments becomes a reality, stocks like Rheinmetall have seen their share prices surge. Jane Sydenham from Rathbones Group believes that the outlook for stocks like it does appear positive.
